SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-07-2017 Dismissal

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Continued To Sep-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Kim West Respondent / Plaintiff
Na'il Benjamin,Benjamin Law Group,415-633-8833 Esq. appearing for Appellant/Respondent Arthur Jackson Residential Adult Program

This cause having been continued from June 1, 2017 now comes on regularly for Trial de Novo, All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Although the Court previously stated there shall be no more continuances,due to a death in the respondent's family, the Court grants their request for continuance.

Counsel for Appellant is not available the first week in August. Therefore, the Court will continue this matter to Thursday, September 7, 2017 at 9:00am. Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported (525)
